content.rendered: Experience the magic of Himachal with our 6-night, 7-day tour covering Shimla, Manali, and Chandigarh. Begin in Shimla, where colonial architecture, scenic hills, and bustling markets set the perfect tone. Continue to Manali, a paradise of snow-capped peaks, lush valleys, and thrilling adventures. Enjoy the serene beauty of Solang Valley and the charm of local temples. Conclude in Chandigarh, a city blending modern design with green landscapes and vibrant culture. With premium stays, smooth transfers, and guided sightseeing, this journey offers relaxation, adventure, and cultural exploration—making it the ideal getaway for families, friends, or couples seeking unforgettable memories.

description: Experience the best of Himachal with a 6-night, 7-day journey through Shimla, Manali, and Chandigarh. From Shimla’s colonial charm and Manali’s snow-capped peaks to Chandigarh’s modern elegance, this trip offers the perfect mix of nature, adventure, and culture—all with comfortable stays and seamless travel.
cost_includes:
3 star premium hotel stay
 All transfers and sightseeing by AC Vehicle
 This cost valid for 6 adults traveling together
 Breakfast, Dinner
 Toll Tax
 Parking
 Driver Allowance
Travel Goodies
 24 x 7 On tour Assistance
 All cost from EX Destination
cost_excludes:
Any meals other than those mentioned above in inclusions
 Airfare / Train Ticket
 GST 5%
 All monument entry Fees
 Any portage at airports and hotels, tips, insurance, wine, mineral water, telephone charges, and all items of personal nature
 Any services not specifically mentioned in the inclusions
Entrance fees to Monuments & other sightseeing points
Expenses caused by factors beyond our control like rail and flight delays, roadblocks, vehicle malfunctions, political disturbances, etc.
Anything not mentioned in inclusions

faqs.title: What is the best time to book this Shimla–Manali–Chandigarh package?
faqs.content: The best time to visit is from March to June for pleasant weather and outdoor activities, and from December to February if you want to enjoy snow in Manali.

faqs.title: Is this package suitable for families with kids and elderly travelers?
faqs.content: Yes, the itinerary is designed for all age groups, with comfortable hotel stays, AC transfers, and moderate sightseeing schedules.

faqs.title: What type of hotels are included in the package?
faqs.content: We provide 3-star premium hotels with all essential amenities. Upgrades to 4-star or 5-star hotels can be arranged on request with extra charges.

faqs.title: Are meals included in the package?
faqs.content: Yes, breakfast and dinner are included. Lunch and any meals outside the inclusions will be at your own expense.

faqs.title: How many people does the given price cover?
faqs.content: The mentioned price is valid for a group of 6 adults traveling together. For smaller or larger groups, pricing may vary.

faqs.title: What are the major attractions covered in this trip?
faqs.content:
Shimla: Mall Road, Kufri, Ridge, Jakhoo Temple

Manali: Solang Valley, Hadimba Temple, Rohtang Pass (seasonal)

Chandigarh: Rock Garden, Sukhna Lake, Rose Garden
